headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents compared for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: Orchids explores conversational assistants and experimental automation. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper. This page compares the two fairly, with market context across Folk, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
